---
name: Skill request
about: A new skill the workspace should ship
title: "[skill] "
labels: "skill-request, enhancement"
assignees: ''
---

## Proposed slug

Kebab-case verb-noun. Example: `build-landing-page`, `extract-objections`.

## Department

- [ ] Foundations
- [ ] Marketing
- [ ] Nurture
- [ ] Sales
- [ ] Launch
- [ ] Scale
- [ ] Partnerships

## What the skill produces

The exact artifact shape. One sentence.

## Why it is not already a skill

Is the need surfacing from real operations, or is this a theoretical gap? Skills ship when operations ask for them — per the roadmap in [`skills/_INDEX.md`](../../skills/_INDEX.md), not to hit a target count.

## Operator source

If the skill encodes a named framework, cite the framework author and the specific surface (book, YouTube series, curriculum) where the methodology lives.

## Required compartments

Which of the 11 compartments does this skill read from? What thresholds does it need? See [`ENCODING.md`](../../ENCODING.md) and [`spec/CONTEXT-THRESHOLDS.md`](../../spec/CONTEXT-THRESHOLDS.md).

## Evidence classification

- [ ] Sacred-format (3/3 blind test)
- [ ] External (2/3 blind test)
- [ ] Internal (1/3 blind test)

## Cross-references

Skills that would produce this skill's input. Skills that would consume this skill's output.

## Additional context

Anything that would help an authoring agent draft the `SKILL.md`.
